next_steps: Complete first-run admin setup at https://sign.example.invalid (or the configured docuseal.public_url).
Set access.nodes[0].ip and web_ui on inventory/manual/systems/docuseal-a.json from query --live upstream_url.
Add a BIND forward A record for sign (or your hostname) pointing at the CT IP.
Configure nginx-waf sites[] with proxy_pass to http://<ct-ip>:3000; enable WebSockets on /.
Backup Postgres volume and ./data document storage together — restore both in the same window.
